title: JSON Form Schema
description: Validation schema for json-form JSON Schemas.

XEventFieldMapping.description: Maps event type keys to target field names in the event payload

NumberFormat.description: Numeric formatting: default (2 decimals), integer, decimal (6 decimals), or decimal-1 (1 decimal place)

RelativeDateKeyword.description: Relative date keyword resolved at validation time; for date-time fields, now includes the current time

IsoDateTimeString.description: ISO 8601 date-time (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss with optional fractional seconds and timezone offset)

DateConstraint.description: Date or date-time constraint for date and date-time fields: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD), ISO datetime (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss), or relative keyword (now, today, yesterday, tomorrow, next-week, last-week, next-month, last-month, next-year, last-year)

supplierVisible.description: When false, field is hidden from supplier-facing views (deprecated; prefer x-permissions use)

isHidden.description: When true, field is not rendered in the form

size.description: Input control size for edit mode

tableColumnFlex.description: Table grid column flex weight for table layout

gridOffset.description: Leading empty columns (0–11) before the field in the grid

gridBreak.description: When true, starts a new grid row before this field

views.description: Per-view presentation overrides merged when a named view is active

i18n.description: Locale-specific overrides for title, description, suffix tooltip, and add-field button text

resetFieldsOnChange.description: Field paths to reset when this field value changes

punchOutFilterKey.description: Field key used to filter punch-out catalog tags

stored.description: When true, field value is included in stored-form payload on save

externalKey.description: External context key for prefilling field value

priceBooksFilterKey.description: Field key used to filter price book catalog tags (datafield fieldset and nested datafield properties only)

priceBooksItemFilterKey.description: Field key used to filter price book item tags

textVariant.description: Text rendering mode: plain (default) or rich HTML (html)

canCopy.description: When true, shows a copy-to-clipboard action in view mode

suffixTooltip.description: Tooltip text shown next to the field suffix icon

currencyKey.description: Form field name whose value supplies the currency code for money fields

currency.description: Currency set directly on the money field

numberFormat.description: Numeric display format for number fields

onlyLowestLevelCategory.description: When true on category fields, restricts selection to leaf category nodes only

durationVariation.description: Unit label for duration fields: days or hours

fieldsetVariant.description: Fieldset widget variant (default, address, datafield, or preferred-supplier)

fieldsetFilter.description: Filter rules for datafield and preferred-supplier fieldsets (static, schema, and external mappings)

datafieldSlug.description: Datafield definition slug when fieldsetVariant is datafield

datafieldPreview.description: Property paths displayed in datafield read-only preview

addFieldText.description: Custom label for the add-item button on group-array fields

mapPreferredSupplierToItems.description: When true on preferred-supplier fieldset, maps selected supplier id onto intake line items

addSupplierButton.description: When true, shows an add-supplier action on preferred-supplier fieldsets

geolocationSearchDisabled.description: When true on address fieldsets, disables geolocation autocomplete and limits search to saved buyer addresses

minDate.description: Minimum allowed value for date (format: date) and date-time (format: date-time) fields; ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD), ISO datetime (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss), or relative keyword (now, today, yesterday, tomorrow, next-week, last-week, next-month, last-month, next-year, last-year)

maxDate.description: Maximum allowed value for date (format: date) and date-time (format: date-time) fields; ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD), ISO datetime (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss), or relative keyword (now, today, yesterday, tomorrow, next-week, last-week, next-month, last-month, next-year, last-year)
